seoTitle: How to Build an Email List on Gumroad and Market to It
metaDescription: Learn how to capture buyer emails on Gumroad, create lead magnets, and send newsletters or broadcasts to grow and market to your audience.
intro: Every sale on Gumroad is also an opportunity to grow a direct line of communication with your customers. This guide shows how to capture emails through free or paid products, organize your audience, and send broadcasts so you can market to your list without leaving the platform.

steps.heading: Open the audience and emails tabs
steps.body: Head to the section of your dashboard where subscriber and email tools live.

steps.heading: Create a lead magnet
steps.body: Set up a free product or opt-in offer designed to capture email addresses from new visitors.

steps.heading: Draft a broadcast
steps.body: Write your email update or newsletter using the built-in composer, then choose your target audience.

steps.heading: Segment your audience
steps.body: Filter recipients by what they've purchased so your messages stay relevant to each group.

steps.heading: Send and review performance
steps.body: Send your broadcast, then check open and click metrics to see how your audience is responding.

faq.question: Do I need a separate email marketing tool with Gumroad?
faq.answer: No, Gumroad includes built-in tools for collecting emails and sending broadcasts directly to your audience.

faq.question: How do I get people onto my email list on Gumroad?
faq.answer: Creating a free product or opt-in listing is a common way to capture emails from people interested in your work.

faq.question: Can I send emails only to people who bought a specific product?
faq.answer: Yes, Gumroad allows you to segment your audience by purchase history before sending a broadcast.

faq.question: Can I see how many people opened my email?
faq.answer: Gumroad provides analytics on your broadcasts, including open and click performance.
